title: Evangelion posters
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion posters?             Quote Post by tamashii » Sun Aug 23, 2009 4:49 am Haha.. so.. My room's looking a little bare. Anyone know where I can find a good Evangelion poster? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Psychodrake » Sun Aug 23, 2009 6:08 am Theres a great selection on ebay (As usual), thats where I tend to get my wall scrolls/posters (Scrolls look much nicer). http://shop.ebay.co.uk/?_from=R40&_trksid=p3907.m38.l1313&_nkw=evangelion+wall+scroll&_sacat=See-All-Categories

[]:             Quote Post by steve_stevenson » Sun Aug 23, 2009 5:20 pm I've been looking at posters and wallscrolls on ebay but I'm concerned about the quality since theyre all bootlegs. can anyone suggest a legit seller or post pics of their stuff?

[]:             Quote Post by tamashii » Tue Aug 25, 2009 4:34 pm After searching some more, seems unlikely to find any legit stuff at this point. lol some of these bootlegs are really really bad: http://stores.shop.ebay.com/SSS-Anime_Poster_W0QQ_fsubZ621876017QQ_sidZ857167987?_nkw=evangelion&submit=Search Something like this seems somewhat bearable though, the drawing for the most part: http://cgi.ebay.com/EVA-Evangelion-Many-Characters-Poster-Anime-eva16_W0QQitemZ250486362389QQcmdZViewItemQQptZLH_DefaultDomain_0?hash=item3a52269115&_trksid=p4634.c0.m14.l1262

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Wed Aug 26, 2009 4:06 pm That kind of sucks. I would like some legit Eva posters as well. It would be awesome to have official movie posters for the new Rebuild movies. Not in the least i would love to have an official poster advertising Evangelion 2.0

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Wed Aug 26, 2009 4:40 pm why not make them yourself? it is a lot cheaper and you can decide yourself what you want it to look like, and that EXACTLY like you want it! it is a bit of work but hey! don't be a lazy fuck!

[]:             Quote Post by tamashii » Thu Aug 27, 2009 12:14 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: That kind of sucks. I would like some legit Eva posters as well. It would be awesome to have official movie posters for the new Rebuild movies. Not in the least i would love to have an official poster advertising Evangelion 2.0

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Aug 27, 2009 1:33 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: I would like some legit Eva posters as well.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Thu Aug 27, 2009 2:12 pm tamashii wrote: @Asuka: lol, i wouldn't know where to begin, and don't you need really high-res pics to make your own posters?

[]:             Quote Post by steve_stevenson » Thu Aug 27, 2009 5:13 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: That kind of sucks. I would like some legit Eva posters as well. It would be awesome to have official movie posters for the new Rebuild movies. Not in the least i would love to have an official poster advertising Evangelion 2.0

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu Sep 03, 2009 12:26 pm i_Love_Asuka wrote: you can find good high res pics all over the web, and even if that's not enough you can download some freeware to size it up without losing quality. AND if that doesn't work either you can just mail the image to a site like Posterjack.com or similar their realy specialized in that sort of things.

[]: Evangelion Posters?             Quote Post by Silaz » Mon Mar 29, 2010 11:27 pm Does anyone have a few websites that sell Evangelion posters? More specifically, posters of Misato? Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Mar 30, 2010 1:58 am Merged with existing thread. May want to look through it, though there aren't that many links.

[]:             Quote Post by steve_stevenson » Tue Mar 30, 2010 2:54 am I dunno about Misato but I ended up getting these Rei and Asuka mega tapestries http://www.hlj.com/product/BRC16949

[]:             Quote Post by Silaz » Fri Apr 02, 2010 12:40 am So after searching the internet for a long while I have found nothing. Very few websites offer good wallscrolls/posters and if they do the website is shady or the picture of the scroll is small. Is there ANY legit website that is reliable? Or is ebay my only option?

[]:             Quote Post by Cypher » Fri Apr 02, 2010 9:17 am http://www.animecastle.com/c-19141-neon-genesis-evangelion-posters.aspx I got a few of my evangelion posters from this store (none of which are available on there anymore) and there all high quality, printed on a thin, laminated cardboard so they won't be damaged easily. Their list of posters for NGE has shortened a bit but maybe you'll find one you like.

[]:             Quote Post by Silaz » Thu Apr 08, 2010 9:38 pm I finally found a good website with posters. I ordered from them and delivery arrived right one time too! http://www.kawaiicorner.com/index.php?cPath=332&&page=1

[]: Eva Posters?             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Fri Apr 01, 2011 11:17 pm (Merged with existing thread) I'm looking to buy a nice Eva poster for my wall. I tried to do some googling but I came up with what looked like a lot of shady, low quality ones, not to mention rather explicit. Where can I go about finding a high quality and presentable poster? Preferably at a reasonable price as well, though I can't imagine any poster costing a whole lot.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Apr 01, 2011 11:42 pm Merged your post to the existing thread. Some of the earlier links may not lead to anything anymore, though.

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Fri Apr 01, 2011 11:52 pm Silaz wrote: I finally found a good website with posters. I ordered from them and delivery arrived right one time too! http://www.kawaiicorner.com/index.php?cPath=332&&page=1
